title: Cilloniz_2019
study_design: Retrospective observational study of prospectively collected data

sample_size.source_quote: The study population therefore comprised 1238 very old patients with CAP.

mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: Gender, smoking status, alcohol consumption, influenza vaccine, pneumococcal vaccine, previous inhaled corticosteroids, previous systemic corticosteroids, previous antibiotic in last week, chronic pulmonary disease, chronic cardiovascular disease, chronic renal disease, chronic liver disease, diabetes mellitus, neurological disease, nursing home residency, PSI risk class, C-reactive protein, lymphocytes, empiric antibiotic treatment, and appropriate empiric antibiotic treatment; inverse probability of treatment weighting

mortality_predictors.predictor_variable: Multivariable model for 30-day mortality in sepsis patients
mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: Inverse probability of treatment weighting with 15 predetermined variables; year of admission
mortality_predictors.source_quote: The area under the ROC curve was 0.71 (95% CI 0.65–0.78) for the multivariable model of 30-day mortality.
